common.welcome: Welcome to Huina Meat (Guangdong) Co., Ltd.

hero.subtitle: Huina Meat · Fresh Quality
hero.description: Huina Meat — Your trusted partner for fresh pork and premium meat products, now in 57 Sam's Club stores across 42 cities.

about.subtitle: About Us
about.title: Leader in Fresh Meat Industry
about.description: Since its establishment in 2021, we have been committed to becoming a leader in the fresh meat industry. We adhere to the core values of Pragmatism, Craftsmanship, Altruism, and Gratitude, focusing on providing customers with high-quality fresh meat products and comprehensive solutions.
about.description2: As a leading fresh pork supplier in China, we have a complete product line, integrating production, processing, R&D, logistics and sales. We continuously innovate with the purpose of providing integrated product and service value for customers and consumers, committed to meeting consumer demand for healthy and delicious meat.
about.description3: The company is headquartered in Shenzhen with business radiating across the country. We put people first, uphold the spirit of craftsmanship, continuously promote technological innovation, and provide customers with high-quality and safe meat products.

quality.title: Quality Assurance
quality.desc: Strict quality control throughout every step from farm to table.

delivery.title: Fresh Delivery
delivery.desc: Full cold chain logistics ensuring optimal freshness.

team.title: Professional Team
team.desc: Experienced meat experts dedicated to excellence.

brand.subtitle: Our Brand
brand.name: Zhaiweng
brand.title: Wanxun Enterprise's Own Brand
brand.description: Zhaiweng is Wanxun Enterprise's own brand, adhering to the concept of Craftsmanship Quality and Inheriting Ingenuity, committed to providing consumers with healthy, delicious and safe meat products. From raw material selection to production and processing, every link is strictly controlled, only to present the best quality products.

products.subtitle: Products
products.title: Explore Our Premium Products
products.description: From premium fresh pork to processed meat products, we offer a comprehensive range to meet your business needs.

porkBelly.name: Pork Belly
porkBelly.desc: Perfect marbling, ideal for slow cooking.

tenderloin.name: Tenderloin
tenderloin.desc: Lean and tender, perfect for quick stir-fry.

shoulder.name: Pork Shoulder
shoulder.desc: Tender and juicy, great for grilling.

trotters.name: Pork Trotters
trotters.desc: Rich in collagen, excellent for soup.

thickCutPorkChop.name: Thick Cut Pork Chop
thickCutPorkChop.desc: Crispy outside, tender inside, perfect for home cooking.

taiwanSausageBlackPepper.name: Taiwan Sausage Black Pepper
taiwanSausageBlackPepper.desc: Classic Taiwan flavor with rich black pepper aroma, individually packaged.

taiwanSausageGarlic.name: Taiwan Sausage Garlic
taiwanSausageGarlic.desc: Full of garlic aroma, firm meat texture, traditional Taiwan flavor.

noodlesWithSausage.name: Noodles with Sausage
noodlesWithSausage.desc: 270g pack, perfect companion for noodles, quick and convenient.

quality.title: Quality Inspection
quality.desc: Multi-stage testing to ensure product safety.

certificates.title: Trustworthy Certifications
certificates.description: Our certifications demonstrate our unwavering commitment to food safety, quality standards, and operational excellence.
